en.name: Space Invaders
en.desc: Defend Earth from alien invasion! Shoot down waves of descending aliens before they reach the bottom. The 1978 shooter that defined a genre!
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys to move left/right and Space to shoot. Destroy all aliens to advance. Aliens move faster as their numbers decrease. You have 3 lives.
tips: Stay under the invaders for easier shots
Watch for the speeding up as enemies decrease
Use predictable movement patterns to aim

zh.name: 太空侵略者
zh.desc: 保卫地球免受外星入侵！在外星人到达底部前击落他们。1978年定义了射击游戏类型的经典！
zh.howToPlay: 使用左右方向键移动，空格键射击。外星人左右移动并逐渐下降。清除所有外星人获胜。他们可以躲进碉堡。
tips: 优先瞄准最前面的外星人
注意躲避外星人的子弹
